svg.title: 4-panel digest #25 — the 'great failure' of evolving an AI for 500 generations

text.tspan: Evolving an AI 500 generations: a "great failure"
We seeded 8 of the world's great minds into the AI
Battle of the smartest minds — begin!
A test everyone aces ranks no one.
